title: CLI Benchmark Summary
description: Summary document generated from raw benchmark JSONL rows. Repeated runs are aggregated per bench_id and tool, including CLI, in-process engine, and external baselines. `wall_us` is preferred for aggregation, speedup, geomean-speedup, and fixed-overhead calculations; `wall_ms` is retained as a rounded compatibility/display field.

tools.description: Per-tool aggregates keyed by tool name. Each tool summary includes per-bench aggregated rows, slowest rows, highest RSS rows, and failures.

comparison.description: Cross-tool comparison keyed by bench_id and summarized by format. CLI speedup prefers markitdown_median_wall_us / moonbit_cli_median_wall_us, engine speedup prefers markitdown_median_wall_us / moonbit_engine_median_wall_us, fixed overhead prefers cli minus engine in microseconds when both succeeded, and geomean speedups are computed over positive comparable rows. Reports mark `timing_precision=ms_fallback` when older wall_ms-only input is summarized.

warnings.description: Report-level cautions such as non-release runner mode or unknown timing provenance.
